author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: I've seen some pretty good stuff on this . Well not exactly what you are thinking but certainly stuff along these lines. In my own view a modification of Shatka Ganga is the way to go. Which is pretty much what I am playing with here. If I were you I'd look at Panacea BOCAF's stuff on the water spark experiments - some good stuff there

author: @joaocarimo
text:
Sir Robert, is it possible to extract hydrogen by inducing a plasma over atomized water? 
Like plasma gasification, but using salt water instead of using water with hydrocarbons.  
Kanarev used to induce plasma electrolysis in plasmatron. 
My idea is to atomize water into finer droplets, super heating with plasma,  in order to extracting hydrogen.
I'm aware that it is possible to extract hydrogen from water by using temperatures above 1500ºC.
